title: Barber-hairdresser
meta_description: Join Parturi-Kampaamo Ikköspaikka Ky as a Barber-Hairdresser in Joensuu! Offered support for contract companies, we provide modern facilities and training
description: We are looking for wonderful colleagues with our expanded operations in Joensuu, Finland. We have two positions available for barber-hairdressers and offer support for contract companies starting their business (you can also start as a work trial). Our modern premises in niinivaara and core centre provide a cozy environment for both hair salon and beauty salon services. With 2 renovated air-conditioned offices, we offer a wide selection of products, websites, social media channels, electronic appointment booking, and checkout options. We support trainings tailored to our business needs. Our team is committed to providing excellent customer service and professional development opportunities.
what_we_expect: A genuine desire to serve customers and develop in the field
job_responsibilities: For contract companies, help to get started (you can also start as a work trial)
search_keywords: barber-hairdresser, expanded operations, hairdressers, modern premises, beauty salon, job content, free-form application, ykkospaikka@gmail.com

title: Research Interviewer
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements and other company and links
meta_description: Join Minado Oy as a Research Interviewer for part-time remote work across projects in Tampere. Flexible hours, no sales tasks, and native language skills
description: We are seeking part-time researchers in our interview team to conduct telephone interviews remotely across various projects, including Korean language research. This role offers a teleworking opportunity and flexible working hours with varying project assignments. The work does not involve sales tasks, and previous experience is not required. Native language skills, a clear and polite approach to work, and a motivated attitude are essential. All tasks are completed entirely remotely on the employee's devices, requiring their own computer with a Chrome browser and headset. Working hours can be adjusted flexibly based on project needs. For inquiries, please contact interviews@minado.fi.
what_we_expect: Clear and polite approach to work
Brisk and motivated attitude towards working
job_responsibilities: Conduct telephone interviews remotely in various projects in Korean and other languages.
search_keywords: research interview, research interviewer, part-time job, remote work, language skills, clear communication, motivated attitude

title: Food Development Expert
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: JoTiMa Oy, Kuopio is seeking a Food development expert in Kuopio. We are looking for a Food Development Expert at JoTiMa Oy in Kuopio. This role involves
description: We are looking for a Food Development Expert at JoTiMa Oy in Kuopio. This role involves developing new recipes and creating healthy food products to meet the company's goal of providing nutritious, innovative solutions aligned with the growing demand for sustainable and healthier food options. The ideal candidate should have strong management principles and experience in food technology. Finnish language skills are required, as well as proficiency in English. Competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements are offered.
what_we_expect: Grow demand for healthy and sustainable food options
job_responsibilities: Develop healthy food products and new recipes for the company's cafe and restaurant operations
search_keywords: food development expert, chef, product development, healthy food products, new recipes

title: Sales Assistant

description: Sommaröstrand Kb, Raasepori is seeking a versatile Sales Assistant for their traditional village shop located in the Tammisaari archipelago. This position offers free-form applications via email, with primary responsibilities including customer service, cash register work, shelving, and cleaning. The ideal candidate should possess strong communication skills and be fluent in both Swedish and Finnish.

title: CNC Machinist
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Barona Teollisuus Oy is seeking a CNC machinist in Vantaa. We are looking for a skilled CNC machinist with experience in turning and milling to join our
description: We are looking for a skilled CNC machinist with experience in turning and milling to join our production team at Barona Teollisuus Oy. This permanent employment opportunity offers 2-shift work and a competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements, as well as opportunities for growth within the company. The ideal candidate will have strong machining skills, proficiency with Fanuc, Heidenhain, or Mori controls, and experience in small-scale production development and CAD/CAM know-how (e.g., Fusion 360). A commitment to working independently, problem-solving, and a high-quality approach is also valued. This position provides a stable work environment, modern machines, and the chance to influence job descriptions while developing skills through varied machining tasks.
what_we_expect: Experience in CNC turning and/or milling.
Strong machining skills with proficiency in Fanuc, Heidenhain, or Mori controls.
Willingness to work independently and problem-solving skills.
A careful and high-quality approach to work.
job_responsibilities: Work with modern machinery and utilize strong machining expertise and programming skills.
Program and machine parts on a DMG Mori NLX 2500 multifunction lathe (M730UM control) or Heidenhain controlled machining centers (TNC 530 / 620 / 640).
Optimize tool selection, perform measurements, and ensure quality assurance.
what_we_offer: Supportive team and development of skills in demanding machining work
search_keywords: CNC Machinist, CNC Turning, CNC Milling, Modern Machinery, Expertise, Initiative, Development, Engineering Company, Small Pieces, Production Development, CAD/CAM Know-How
